user.title: Connect to Firewalla MSP
user.description: Enter your MSP domain (e.g. `mydomain.firewalla.net`) and a personal access token from your MSP Account Settings.

pick_box.title: Select a box
pick_box.description: Choose which Firewalla box to add. Add more entries to manage additional boxes.

reauth_confirm.title: Firewalla MSP token expired
reauth_confirm.description: Paste a new personal access token to restore access.

error.invalid_auth: The token was rejected. Check that it hasn't been deleted in MSP Account Settings.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the MSP domain.
error.no_boxes: No boxes found in this MSP account.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant log.

abort.already_configured: This Firewalla box is already configured.
abort.all_boxes_configured: Every box in this MSP account is already configured.
abort.box_not_found: That box could not be found. Try again.

data.hierarchical_devices: Nest devices under the box in the device registry

pause_device.name: Pause device
pause_device.description: Block internet access for one or more devices, then auto-resume after the duration.

pause_group.name: Pause group
pause_group.description: Block internet access for every device in a group, then auto-resume after the duration.
